nodes.label: AI as knowledge refresher for unfamiliar topics
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or confusing source

nodes.label: AI as practical problem solver
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of irrelevant or misleading code suggestions
nodes.grounding_span: If I run into problems with code or need to quickly learn how to use an external library I might use an AI model

nodes.label: Confidentiality in AI use
nodes.label_negative: Unsafe AI interaction risking data exposure
nodes.grounding_span: This is to keep what I am working on confidential

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes that back and forth is a better approach because it gives me a deeper understanding

nodes.label: Self-handling of data-intensive tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I mostly handle data intensive tasks myself because they can contain sensitive data

nodes.label: Self-building automation with future expansion
nodes.label_negative: Using AI to build automation without foresight
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to build out myself because I have a good idea of where a project might be developing towards

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as independent implementer without validation
nodes.grounding_span: I will collaborate with the model to solve a problem and implement the fix to validate that it works

nodes.label: AI accuracy for less common languages
nodes.label_negative: AI mixing up concepts from different languages
nodes.grounding_span: When using less common languages, sometimes the models would mix up concepts with more commonly used languages

nodes.label: AI as future physical assistant in embedded work
nodes.grounding_span: I hope to have AI integrated in a more physical form, i.e, robotics

nodes.label: Deep understanding
nodes.grounding_span: gives me a deeper understanding of the error and might give me additional ideas

nodes.label: Privacy and data security
nodes.grounding_span: Failing to protect this data can result in server ramifications, not only for me but the company and customers

nodes.label: Efficient and future-proof system design
nodes.grounding_span: I can build the ecosystem that is needed now with additional features which can be used later

nodes.label: Professional growth and skill maintenance
nodes.grounding_span: To maintain my skill, I continue to practice these skills on my own

nodes.label: Frustration with AI inaccuracy for niche languages

nodes.label: Preference for human handling of sensitive tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I mostly handle data intensive tasks myself because they can contain sensitive data

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI integration
nodes.grounding_span: I hope to have AI integrated in a more physical form

nodes.label: Systematic modular decomposition for future reuse
nodes.grounding_span: knowing how to break down different components of your system for reuse

nodes.label: Iterative validation and clarification seeking
